name: Philadelphia Pepper Pot Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Finely diced leeks or green onion
1/2 cup Green pepper, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine in a large saucepan.
2. Add onions, leeks, celery, and ham. Stir until vegetables are tender.
3. Add water and bouillon cubes. Cook until bouillon cubes are dissolved.
4. Add remaining ingredients. Simmer for 5 minutes.
